subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all mention and hearing, befitteth the Lord of Names, Who, from the Sun in the heaven of knowledge, illumineth the world [3.5s]... ...Thou hast written that one of the friends hath composed a treatise. This was mentioned in the Holy Presence, and this is what was revealed in response… Whatever is written should not transgress the bounds of tact and wisdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و اصغا مالک اسما را لایق و سزاست که از آفتاب آسمان علم عالم
subcodes.subjects: @law of fasting, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity
